title: coreopsis helleborifolia
intro: Coreopsis helleborifolia, also known as the Hellebore Coreopsis, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Coreopsis helleborifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity. Coreopsis helleborifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
